ex.jp: 記念日に高級なレストランで食事をした。
ex.en: We dined at a high-class restaurant for our anniversary.

qs.s: この時計は＿＿＿＿ブランドのもので、とても高い。
qs.en: This watch is from a luxury brand and very expensive.
qs.e: 高級 = high-class/luxury (in grade and price). 高度 = advanced/high-level (technical). 上等 = first-rate quality (more old-fashioned). 貴重 = precious/valuable (rare).

qs.s: 「高級」の意味は？
qs.e: 高級 describes something expensive and of high grade (高級車 = luxury car, 高級住宅街 = upscale neighborhood).

ex.jp: この工場では精密機械を製作している。
ex.en: This factory manufactures precision machinery.

qs.s: 新しい部品の＿＿＿＿には専門の設備が必要だ。
qs.en: Manufacturing the new parts requires specialized equipment.
qs.e: 製作 = manufacturing goods/machinery (also films). 作成 = drafting documents/plans. 創作 = creating original artistic works. 工作 = handicraft; (also) maneuvering/scheming.

qs.s: 「製作」の意味は？
o: manufacture; production of goods or machinery
qs.e: 製作 is making physical products or films (映画製作 = film production, 製作所 = manufacturing works). Compare 作成 (documents) and 制作 (creative/media works) — all read せいさく except 作成.

ex.jp: 地震の直後、人々は外へ避難した。
ex.en: Immediately after the earthquake, people evacuated outside.

qs.s: 卒業の＿＿＿＿に就職して、海外へ赴任した。
qs.en: Right after graduating, he got a job and was posted overseas.
qs.e: 直後 = immediately after. 直前 = immediately before (the opposite). 以後 = after/from then on (broader, ongoing). 当初 = at the beginning/initially.

qs.s: 「直後」の意味は？
qs.e: 直後 marks the moment right after an event (事故の直後 = right after the accident). Opposite of 直前 (just before).

m: beauty care; cosmetic care (of skin, figure)

ex.jp: 彼女は美容のために毎朝ヨガをしている。
ex.en: She does yoga every morning for beauty care.

qs.s: 十分な睡眠は健康にも＿＿＿＿にも良いとされている。
qs.en: Sufficient sleep is said to be good for both health and beauty.
qs.e: 美容 = beauty care (skin, figure, grooming). 美術 = fine art. 化粧 = makeup/cosmetics (the act). 整形 = cosmetic/plastic surgery.

qs.s: 「美容」の意味は？
qs.e: 美容 covers care for one's looks and figure (美容院 = beauty salon, 美容師 = hairdresser, 美容液 = beauty serum).

ex.jp: 平日は人が少ないので、ゆっくり買い物ができる。
ex.en: There are fewer people on weekdays, so I can shop at a relaxed pace.

qs.s: この美術館は＿＿＿＿のみ開館し、週末は休みだ。
qs.en: This museum opens only on weekdays and is closed on weekends.
qs.e: 平日 = weekday (ordinary working day). 休日 = day off/holiday. 祝日 = a public/national holiday. 連休 = consecutive holidays (a long weekend).

qs.s: 「平日」の意味は？
qs.e: 平日 means a regular weekday (Mon–Fri), as opposed to 休日 (days off) or 祝日 (public holidays).

ex.jp: 激しい運動の後、全身が痛い。
ex.en: After intense exercise, my whole body aches.

qs.s: 彼は＿＿＿＿の力を込めてロープを引いた。
qs.en: He pulled the rope with his whole body's strength.
qs.e: 全身 = the whole body (physical). 全体 = the whole/entirety (of a thing or group). 全員 = all members/everyone. 全部 = all of it (every part).

qs.s: 「全身」の意味は？
qs.e: 全身 specifically refers to the entire body (全身運動 = full-body exercise, 全身鏡 = full-length mirror).

m: all one's strength; full effort; one's utmost

ex.jp: 最後の試合に全力を尽くした。
ex.en: I gave my all in the final match.

qs.s: 目標達成のため、チーム＿＿＿＿で取り組んでいる。
qs.en: We're tackling it with the whole team's full effort to reach the goal.
qs.e: 全力 = all one's strength/full effort (全力を尽くす = do one's utmost). 努力 = effort/diligence (ongoing). 実力 = real ability/competence. 勢力 = power/influence (of a force or group).

qs.s: 「全力」の意味は？
o: all one's strength; full effort; utmost
qs.e: 全力 = giving everything you've got (全力疾走 = running at full speed, 全力投球 = giving it your all).

ex.jp: この治療には高度な技術が求められる。
ex.en: This treatment requires advanced technical skill.

qs.s: 現代社会は＿＿＿＿に情報化が進んでいる。
qs.en: Modern society has become highly advanced in information technology.
qs.e: 高度 = advanced/high-level (高度な技術), also altitude. 高級 = luxury/high-class. 高等 = higher (高等教育 = higher education). 高価 = expensive/costly.

qs.s: 「高度」の意味は？
qs.e: 高度 means advanced/sophisticated (高度経済成長 = rapid economic growth) and literally altitude (飛行機の高度 = the plane's altitude).

m: gathering; assembly; meeting up (at a set place/time)

ex.jp: 明日は駅前に八時集合です。
ex.en: Tomorrow we meet up in front of the station at eight.

qs.s: 遠足の＿＿＿＿場所は学校の正門前です。
qs.en: The meeting point for the field trip is in front of the school's main gate.
qs.e: 集合 = gathering/meeting up at a set place and time. 集中 = concentration/focusing. 集会 = an assembly/rally (an organized meeting). 結集 = rallying/mustering together (forces, effort).

qs.s: 「集合」の意味は？
o: gathering; meeting up at a set place/time
qs.e: 集合 = people coming together at an appointed spot (集合時間 = meeting time, 集合場所 = assembly point). Opposite is 解散 (dispersing).

m: item; entry; category (in a list or form)

ex.jp: 申込書のすべての項目に記入してください。
ex.en: Please fill in all the items on the application form.

qs.s: 点検すべき＿＿＿＿をリストにまとめておいた。
qs.en: I compiled into a list the items to be inspected.
qs.e: 項目 = an item/entry in a list or set of categories. 件数 = the number of cases/items (a count). 番号 = a number (identifier). 種類 = type/kind/variety.

qs.s: 「項目」の意味は？
o: item; entry; category in a list
qs.e: 項目 is one labeled item or heading among several (チェック項目 = checklist items, 必須項目 = required fields).

ex.jp: 彼は趣味で小説の創作を続けている。
ex.en: He continues creative writing of novels as a hobby.

qs.s: その話は事実ではなく、作家の＿＿＿＿だった。
qs.en: That story wasn't fact but the author's invention.
qs.e: 創作 = original creation/invention (art, fiction); can also imply a fabrication. 模倣 = imitation/copying. 翻訳 = translation. 編集 = editing/compiling.

qs.s: 「創作」の意味は？
qs.e: 創作 emphasizes creating something original from imagination (創作料理 = original/inventive cuisine, 創作活動 = creative work). Can also mean a made-up story.

ex.jp: 毎月、電車の定期券を買っている。
ex.en: I buy a train commuter pass every month.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿があれば、区間内は何度でも乗り降り自由だ。
qs.en: With a commuter pass, you can get on and off freely within the section as often as you like.
qs.e: 定期券 = a pass valid for a fixed period on a set route. 回数券 = a booklet of multiple-ride tickets. 乗車券 = a single (boarding) ticket. 整理券 = a numbered ticket for boarding order/queue.

qs.s: 「定期券」の意味は？
qs.e: 定期券 (often shortened to 定期) lets you travel a fixed route freely for a set period — typical for commuting (通勤定期, 通学定期).

ex.jp: 彼は寒さには平気らしい。
ex.en: He seems to be fine with the cold.

qs.s: ひどいことを言われても、彼女は＿＿＿＿な顔をしていた。
qs.en: Even when told something cruel, she kept an unbothered expression.
qs.e: 平気 = unconcerned/unfazed/fine with it. 不安 = anxious/uneasy. 迷惑 = bothered/troubled (by a nuisance). 退屈 = bored.

qs.s: 「平気」の意味は？
qs.e: 平気 means being unfazed or perfectly fine (平気で嘘をつく = lie without a qualm, 〜しても平気 = it's fine even if ~).

ex.jp: 娘は今年から幼稚園に通い始めた。
ex.en: My daughter started attending kindergarten this year.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿の子どもたちが先生と一緒に歌っている。
qs.en: The kindergarten children are singing with their teacher.
qs.e: 幼稚園 = kindergarten (educational, age ~3–6, under MEXT). 小学校 = elementary school. 保育園 = day-care nursery (welfare-based, for younger children of working parents). 大学院 = graduate school.

qs.s: 「幼稚園」の意味は？
qs.e: 幼稚園 is preschool education for ages roughly 3–6. Distinct from 保育園, which is welfare day-care for children of working parents.

ex.jp: 用事を済ませて、さっさと帰ろう。
ex.en: Let's finish our errands and head home quickly.

qs.s: ぐずぐずしないで、＿＿＿＿支度をしなさい。
qs.en: Stop dawdling and get ready quickly.
qs.e: さっさと = quickly, briskly, without wasting time (often urging). のんびり = leisurely/relaxed. うっかり = carelessly/absent-mindedly. こっそり = secretly/stealthily.

qs.s: 「さっさと」の意味は？
qs.e: さっさと conveys doing something briskly and without delay, often impatiently (さっさとしなさい = hurry up and do it).

ex.jp: 彼女は営業で確かな実績を上げている。
ex.en: She has a solid track record in sales.

qs.s: 口先だけでなく、これまでの＿＿＿＿で評価されるべきだ。
qs.en: He should be judged by his actual track record, not just talk.
qs.e: 実績 = a proven track record / actual results achieved. 実力 = real ability/competence (potential). 業績 = (business) performance/accomplishments of a company. 成績 = grades/marks; results of an evaluation.

qs.s: 「実績」の意味は？
qs.e: 実績 is the concrete record of what someone has actually accomplished (実績がある = has a proven track record). 実力 is ability not yet demonstrated.

m: taking an exam; sitting an entrance examination

ex.jp: 息子は来年、高校を受験する。
ex.en: My son will sit the high-school entrance exam next year.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿勉強のために、夜遅くまで塾に通っている。
qs.en: He goes to cram school until late at night to study for entrance exams.
qs.e: 受験 = taking an entrance/qualifying exam. 受付 = reception/front desk. 受講 = taking/attending a course. 受信 = receiving (a signal, message).

qs.s: 「受験」の意味は？
o: taking an entrance exam; sitting an exam
qs.e: 受験 specifically means sitting for an examination, usually an entrance exam (受験生 = exam candidate, 大学受験 = university entrance exams).

m: excessive; unnecessary; more than needed; all the more

ex.jp: 余計なことを言って、彼を怒らせてしまった。
ex.en: I said something unnecessary and made him angry.

qs.s: 手伝うつもりが、かえって＿＿＿＿な手間を増やしてしまった。
qs.en: I meant to help, but I only created extra, unnecessary work.
qs.e: 余計 = unnecessary/uncalled-for, or 'all the more' as an adverb. 余分 = surplus/extra (a spare amount, more neutral). 十分 = sufficient/enough. 適当 = suitable; (also) half-hearted/random.

qs.s: 「余計」の意味は？
o: excessive; unnecessary; uncalled-for; all the more
qs.e: 余計 often means superfluous or uncalled-for (余計なお世話 = none of your business). As an adverb it means 'all the more' (余計に悲しい = even sadder).

ex.jp: 練習の回数を増やしたら、上達した。
ex.en: When I increased the number of practice sessions, I improved.

qs.s: 薬を飲む＿＿＿＿は一日三回と決められている。
qs.en: The number of times to take the medicine is set at three per day.
qs.e: 回数 = how many times something occurs (a count of occurrences). 人数 = number of people. 数量 = quantity/amount. 時間 = time/hours.

qs.s: 「回数」の意味は？
qs.e: 回数 counts repetitions or occurrences (回数を重ねる = do it many times over, 回数券 = a book of ride tickets).

ex.jp: 天皇は日本国の象徴とされている。
ex.en: The Emperor is regarded as the symbol of the State of Japan.

qs.s: 新しい＿＿＿＿の即位を祝う式典が行われた。
qs.en: A ceremony was held to celebrate the new Emperor's enthronement.
qs.e: 天皇 = the Emperor of Japan (hereditary, a symbol of the state). 首相 = prime minister (head of government). 大統領 = president (of a republic). 将軍 = shogun (historical military ruler).

qs.s: 「天皇」の意味は？
qs.e: 天皇 refers to Japan's hereditary emperor, defined in the constitution as the symbol of the state (天皇陛下 = His Majesty the Emperor).

ex.jp: この曲を聞くと、学生時代を懐かしく思い出す。
ex.en: Hearing this song, I fondly recall my student days.

qs.s: 古いアルバムを見て、＿＿＿＿気持ちになった。
qs.en: Looking at the old album, I felt nostalgic.
qs.e: 懐かしい = nostalgic, fondly missed. 羨ましい = envious. 騒がしい = noisy/rowdy. 頼もしい = reliable/dependable (reassuring).

qs.s: 「懐かしい」の意味は？
qs.e: 懐かしい expresses warm longing for the past (懐かしい友 = a dear old friend, 懐かしい味 = a taste that brings back memories).

ex.jp: この駐車場は有料です。
ex.en: This parking lot charges a fee.

qs.s: サービスの一部は＿＿＿＿で、追加料金がかかる。
qs.en: Part of the service is paid and incurs an additional charge.
qs.e: 有料 = requiring payment (not free). 無料 = free of charge (the opposite). 有効 = valid/effective. 有給 = paid (as in 有給休暇 = paid leave).

qs.s: 「有料」の意味は？
qs.e: 有料 means something costs money (有料道路 = toll road, 有料会員 = paid member). Opposite of 無料 (free).

ex.jp: 会議が予定より延長された。
ex.en: The meeting was extended beyond schedule.

qs.s: 工事の遅れで、完成時期の＿＿＿＿が決まった。
qs.en: Due to construction delays, an extension of the completion date was decided.
qs.e: 延長 = extending the length/duration of something. 短縮 = shortening (the opposite). 延期 = postponing to a later date. 継続 = continuing an ongoing activity.

qs.s: 「延長」の意味は？
qs.e: 延長 means making something longer in time or distance (延長戦 = overtime/extra innings, 期限を延長する = extend a deadline). 延期 instead means pushing a date back.

m: misunderstanding; mistaken impression; getting the wrong idea

ex.jp: 待ち合わせの場所を勘違いしていた。
ex.en: I had misunderstood the meeting place.

qs.s: 彼を犯人だと思ったのは、私の＿＿＿＿だった。
qs.en: Thinking he was the culprit was a mistake on my part.
qs.e: 勘違い = mistaken belief/getting the wrong idea. 言い訳 = an excuse. 思いやり = consideration/empathy. 心当たり = a clue/idea of what's behind something.

qs.s: 「勘違い」の意味は？
qs.e: 勘違い is mistakenly believing something to be the case (勘違いする = to be mistaken, get it wrong). Differs from 誤解, which is misunderstanding another's meaning.

ex.jp: 彼女は素直に自分の失敗を認めた。
ex.en: She honestly admitted her own mistake.

qs.s: 子どもは親の助言を＿＿＿＿に聞き入れた。
qs.en: The child took the parent's advice obediently to heart.
qs.e: 素直 = honest/receptive/unresistant (accepting things without distortion). 頑固 = stubborn (the opposite). 勝手 = selfish/doing as one pleases. わがまま = selfish/willful.

qs.s: 「素直」の意味は？
qs.e: 素直 describes someone who accepts things openly and without twisting them — frank, docile, receptive (素直に謝る = apologize honestly). Opposite of 頑固 (stubborn).

ex.jp: この政策の狙いは雇用の拡大だ。
ex.en: The aim of this policy is to expand employment.

qs.s: 広告の本当の＿＿＿＿は、新規顧客の獲得にある。
qs.en: The real aim of the advertisement is to acquire new customers.
qs.e: 狙い = the aim/intent behind an action. 結果 = the result/outcome. 原因 = the cause. 影響 = influence/effect.

qs.s: 「狙い」の意味は？
qs.e: 狙い is the intended target or purpose of an action (狙いを定める = take aim, 狙い通り = just as intended). The verb is 狙う (to aim at).

ex.jp: イベント会場は厳重に警備されていた。
ex.en: The event venue was tightly guarded.

qs.s: 要人の訪問に備え、空港の＿＿＿＿が強化された。
qs.en: In preparation for the VIP's visit, security at the airport was strengthened.
qs.e: 警備 = security/guarding (protecting a place/people from threats). 防止 = prevention (stopping something bad from happening). 監視 = surveillance/keeping watch. 保護 = protection/safeguarding (of the vulnerable).

qs.s: 「警備」の意味は？
qs.e: 警備 means standing guard to protect a place or people (警備員 = security guard, 警備会社 = security firm). 監視 is watching/monitoring; 警備 implies active protection.

ex.jp: 彼は国立大学に合格した。
ex.en: He passed the entrance exam for a national university.

qs.s: この絵画は＿＿＿＿美術館に所蔵されている。
qs.en: This painting is held in the national museum.
qs.e: 国立 = national (run by the central government). 私立 = private (privately run). 市立 = municipal (city-run). 公立 = public (run by local government, broader than 市立).

qs.s: 「国立」の意味は？
qs.e: 国立 means established and funded by the national government (国立公園 = national park, 国立大学 = national university). Contrast 私立 (private) and 公立 (locally public).

m: author; creator (of a work of art or literature)

ex.jp: この小説の作者は誰ですか。
ex.en: Who is the author of this novel?

qs.s: この物語の＿＿＿＿は、自身の体験をもとに書いたそうだ。
qs.en: The author of this story reportedly wrote it based on personal experience.
qs.e: 作者 = creator/author of a creative work (novel, painting, play). 読者 = reader. 記者 = (news) reporter/journalist. 著者 = author specifically of a published book.

qs.s: 「作者」の意味は？
o: author; creator of an artistic work
qs.e: 作者 is the creator of a work — broader than 著者 (which refers to the writer of a published book). Used for novels, art, plays, etc.

ex.jp: 今日は比較的暖かい。
ex.en: It's comparatively warm today.

qs.s: この問題は＿＿＿＿簡単なので、すぐに解けるだろう。
qs.en: This problem is relatively easy, so you'll probably solve it quickly.
qs.e: 比較的 = comparatively/relatively (in comparison with others). 圧倒的 = overwhelming. 徹底的 = thorough/exhaustive. 絶対的 = absolute.

qs.s: 「比較的」の意味は？
qs.e: 比較的 means 'relatively' — judged against some comparison (比較的安い = relatively cheap). It softens the statement rather than asserting an absolute.

ex.jp: 駅の付近にコンビニがありますか。
ex.en: Is there a convenience store in the vicinity of the station?

qs.s: 事故現場＿＿＿＿は一時、通行止めになった。
qs.en: The area near the accident site was temporarily closed to traffic.
qs.e: 付近 = vicinity, near a specific point. 周辺 = surrounding zone (broader area around). 近所 = neighborhood (where people live, social sense). 辺り = around/about (vaguer, also approximation).

qs.s: 「付近」の意味は？
qs.e: 付近 points to the area immediately near a specific place (この付近 = around here). Compare 周辺, which covers a wider surrounding zone.

m: public announcement; official disclosure; making public

ex.jp: 調査結果は来週、公表される予定だ。
ex.en: The survey results are scheduled to be made public next week.

qs.s: 会社は事故の原因を調査の上、＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: After investigating, the company publicly disclosed the cause of the accident.
qs.e: 公表 = officially disclosing information to the public (often something previously private or sensitive). 発表 = announcing/presenting (broad). 公開 = opening to public access/viewing. 報告 = reporting to a specific party.

qs.s: 「公表」の意味は？
qs.e: 公表 stresses formally disclosing facts to the wider public (情報を公表する = disclose information). 発表 is a more general 'announce'; 公開 means making something openly accessible.

ex.jp: 二つの政党は意見が激しく対立している。
ex.en: The two political parties are sharply opposed in opinion.

qs.s: 労使の＿＿＿＿が深まり、交渉は決裂した。
qs.en: The conflict between labor and management deepened, and negotiations broke down.
qs.e: 対立 = confrontation/conflict between opposing sides. 協力 = cooperation. 妥協 = compromise (meeting in the middle). 和解 = reconciliation/settling a dispute.

qs.s: 「対立」の意味は？
qs.e: 対立 describes two sides standing in opposition (意見の対立 = clash of opinions, 対立候補 = opposing candidate). Opposite of 協力 (cooperation).

m: immediately before; just before; on the eve of

ex.jp: 出発の直前に忘れ物に気づいた。
ex.en: Just before departure, I noticed I'd forgotten something.

qs.s: 試験の＿＿＿＿になって慌てても、もう遅い。
qs.en: Panicking right before the exam is already too late.
qs.e: 直前 = immediately before. 直後 = immediately after (the opposite). 以前 = before/previously (broader, in the past). 当面 = for the present/for now.

qs.s: 「直前」の意味は？
qs.e: 直前 marks the moment just before an event (締め切り直前 = right before the deadline). Opposite of 直後.

m: movement; motion; action (of body or machine); operation

ex.jp: この機械は動作が不安定だ。
ex.en: This machine's operation is unstable.

qs.s: ダンサーの一つ一つの＿＿＿＿が美しい。
qs.en: Each of the dancer's movements is beautiful.
qs.e: 動作 = a discrete physical movement/motion, or a machine's operation. 活動 = activity (engaging in something ongoing). 運動 = exercise; a movement/campaign. 行動 = behavior/conduct (purposeful action).

qs.s: 「動作」の意味は？
qs.e: 動作 refers to a specific bodily movement or a device's operation (動作確認 = operation check, 動作が遅い = slow movements/sluggish operation).

m: column; field; section (in a form, newspaper, table)

ex.jp: コメント欄に意見を書いてください。
ex.en: Please write your opinion in the comment field.

qs.s: 氏名の＿＿＿＿に、フルネームを記入してください。
qs.en: Please enter your full name in the name field.
qs.e: 欄 = a designated column/field/section (for writing or in print). 枠 = a frame/box/quota. 面 = a side/surface/page (面 in newspaper sections too, but 欄 is the named column). 巻 = a volume/scroll (counter for books).

qs.s: 「欄」の意味は？
o: column; field; section in a form or print
qs.e: 欄 is a labeled space or column (記入欄 = entry field, 投書欄 = letters-to-the-editor column, 備考欄 = remarks field).

ex.jp: 複数の団体が連合して活動している。
ex.en: Several organizations are working in alliance.

qs.s: 国際＿＿＿＿は世界平和を目的に設立された。
qs.en: The international union was established for the purpose of world peace.
qs.e: 連合 = a union/alliance/federation of groups. 連続 = a continuous sequence/run. 連絡 = contact/communication. 連帯 = solidarity (shared responsibility, standing together).

qs.s: 「連合」の意味は？
qs.e: 連合 means several groups joining into a larger body (連合国 = the Allied Powers, 連合軍 = allied/coalition forces).

m: as usual; as ever; the same as before

ex.jp: 彼は相変わらず元気そうだ。
ex.en: He seems as energetic as ever.

qs.s: 久しぶりに訪ねたが、町は＿＿＿＿静かだった。
qs.en: I visited after a long while, but the town was quiet as ever.
qs.e: 相変わらず = unchanged, as always. 突然 = suddenly. 意外と = unexpectedly/more than expected. 次第に = gradually.

qs.s: 「相変わらず」の意味は？
o: as usual; as ever; the same as before
qs.e: 相変わらず indicates a state continues unchanged from before (相変わらず忙しい = busy as always). Often carries a tone of familiarity.

ex.jp: 合格の通知が郵便で届いた。
ex.en: The notice of acceptance arrived by mail.

qs.s: 予定の変更は、メールで全員に＿＿＿＿された。
qs.en: The schedule change was notified to everyone by email.
qs.e: 通知 = a formal notice/notification. 通過 = passing through (a point). 通用 = being accepted/valid (e.g. currency, an excuse 通用する). 通行 = passage/traffic (going along a route).

qs.s: 「通知」の意味は？
o: being accepted as valid; current use
qs.e: 通知 means officially informing someone (通知書 = notification letter, 合格通知 = acceptance notice, プッシュ通知 = push notification).

ex.jp: 人との繋がりを大切にしたい。
ex.en: I want to cherish my connections with people.

qs.s: この二つの事件には深い＿＿＿＿があるようだ。
qs.en: There seems to be a deep connection between these two incidents.
qs.e: 繋がり = a connection/link/bond between things or people. 区切り = a break/division/punctuation point. 隔たり = a gap/distance (between things). 決まり = a rule; a settled matter.

qs.s: 「繋がり」の意味は？
qs.e: 繋がり (from 繋がる, to be connected) means a link or bond (人との繋がり = human connections, 血の繋がり = blood ties).

m: lecturer; instructor (at a school, seminar, or university)

ex.jp: 彼は英会話教室の講師をしている。
ex.en: He works as an instructor at an English conversation school.

qs.s: 今回のセミナーには、外部から専門の＿＿＿＿を招いた。
qs.en: For this seminar, we invited a specialist instructor from outside.
qs.e: 講師 = a lecturer/instructor (often part-time, or a non-tenured university rank; gives 講義/lessons). 教師 = a (school) teacher. 生徒 = a pupil/student. 校長 = a school principal.

qs.s: 「講師」の意味は？
o: lecturer; instructor at a school or seminar
qs.e: 講師 is someone who delivers lessons or lectures, often invited or part-time (非常勤講師 = part-time lecturer, ゲスト講師 = guest lecturer). 教師 is the standard word for a schoolteacher.

m: (one's own) husband; master/owner (of a shop or house)

ex.jp: 主人は今、出張で留守です。
ex.en: My husband is away on a business trip right now.

qs.s: 店の＿＿＿＿が、笑顔で客を出迎えた。
qs.en: The shop's owner greeted the customers with a smile.
qs.e: 主人 = the master/owner of a household or shop; also 'my husband.' 客人 = a guest. 他人 = a stranger/other person. 本人 = the person in question/oneself.

qs.s: 「主人」の意味は？
o: one's husband; the master/owner of a place
qs.e: 主人 means the head/owner of a household or business (ご主人 = your husband / the proprietor), and a wife may call her husband 主人.

ex.jp: 統計によると、人口は減少している。
ex.en: According to statistics, the population is decreasing.

qs.s: 政府の＿＿＿＿データをもとに、将来を予測する。
qs.en: We forecast the future based on government statistical data.
qs.e: 統計 = statistics (collected numerical data and its analysis). 計算 = calculation/computation. 計画 = a plan. 会計 = accounting; the bill/check.

qs.s: 「統計」の意味は？
qs.e: 統計 refers to gathered numerical data and its study (統計を取る = collect statistics, 人口統計 = demographic statistics).

m: various places; each region; all over (the country)

ex.jp: この祭りは全国各地で行われる。
ex.en: This festival is held in various places all over the country.

qs.s: 台風の影響で、＿＿＿＿で大雨が観測された。
qs.en: Due to the typhoon, heavy rain was observed in various regions.
qs.e: 各地 = various places/regions (each area). 各自 = each person individually. 現地 = the actual site/local area (where something happens). 産地 = a place of production/origin (of goods).

qs.s: 「各地」の意味は？
o: various places; each region; all over
the actual site; the local area
qs.e: 各地 means many different regions or places (世界各地 = all over the world, 各地で = in various locations).

m: as expected (of); just as you'd expect; truly impressive

ex.jp: 流石ベテランだけあって、仕事が速い。
ex.en: As you'd expect from a veteran, his work is fast.

qs.s: 難しい問題を一瞬で解くとは、＿＿＿＿だ。
qs.en: Solving such a hard problem in an instant—that's impressive, as expected.
qs.e: 流石(さすが) = living up to expectations / 'as expected' (admiringly). 今更 = now (at this late stage). 案外 = unexpectedly/contrary to expectation. 結局 = in the end/after all.

qs.s: 「流石」の意味は？
o: as expected (admiringly); just as you'd expect
qs.e: 流石 (usually written さすが) praises something for living up to its reputation (さすがプロ = that's a pro for you). Note: 案外 expresses the opposite — surprise.

m: while doing something else; on the same occasion; opportunity

ex.jp: 買い物のついでに郵便局に寄った。
ex.en: On the way while shopping, I dropped by the post office.

qs.s: 出かける＿＿＿＿に、このゴミを捨ててきてくれる？
qs.en: While you're heading out, could you take out this trash?
qs.e: ついで = doing one thing while already doing another (〜のついでに = while you're at it). おかげ = thanks to. わけ = reason. つもり = intention/plan.

qs.s: 「ついで」の意味は？
o: while doing something else; on the same occasion
intention; what one plans to do
qs.e: ついで refers to taking the opportunity of doing one thing to also do another (〜のついでに = while one is at it, on the way).

m: demonstration; display (of ability); bringing out one's full potential

ex.jp: 本番で実力を発揮できなかった。
ex.en: I couldn't display my true ability in the real performance.

qs.s: 彼はリーダーとしての才能を存分に＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: He fully demonstrated his talent as a leader.
qs.e: 発揮 = bringing out and displaying ability/qualities. 発見 = discovery (finding something new). 発展 = development/growth. 発生 = occurrence/outbreak (something arising).

qs.s: 「発揮」の意味は？
o: display of ability; bringing out one's potential
qs.e: 発揮 means putting one's abilities or qualities into full effect (力を発揮する = bring one's power to bear, 実力を発揮 = show one's true skill).

m: transport; conveyance; shipping (of goods or people)

ex.jp: 商品はトラックで全国に輸送される。
ex.en: The goods are transported nationwide by truck.

qs.s: 災害地への物資の＿＿＿＿が急がれている。
qs.en: The transport of supplies to the disaster area is being rushed.
qs.e: 輸送 = transporting goods/people in bulk over distance. 輸入 = importing (bringing goods into a country). 運転 = driving/operating (a vehicle or machine). 移動 = moving/relocating (general).

qs.s: 「輸送」の意味は？
qs.e: 輸送 refers to carrying goods or people, often in large quantities (輸送費 = transport costs, 大量輸送 = mass transit/bulk transport).

m: place; spot; point; (counter for) passages or sections

ex.jp: 間違っている箇所を直してください。
ex.en: Please correct the spots that are wrong.

qs.s: 壊れた＿＿＿＿は全部で三つあった。
qs.en: There were three broken spots in total.
qs.e: 箇所 = a specific spot/point, often one of several (and a counter: 三箇所 = three spots). 場所 = a place/location (general). 位置 = position (where in space). 地点 = a (geographic) point/site.

qs.s: 「箇所」の意味は？
o: a specific spot/point; counter for sections
qs.e: 箇所 picks out particular points or passages, often counted (危険箇所 = hazard spots, 修正箇所 = points to be corrected). Also a counter: 数箇所 = several spots.

m: the actual feeling; realizing through experience; real sense

ex.jp: 優勝した実感がまだ湧かない。
ex.en: It still doesn't feel real that we won.

qs.s: 現地を訪れて、初めて戦争の悲惨さを＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: Visiting the site, I felt the misery of war for real for the first time.
qs.e: 実感 = feeling something as real through direct experience. 想像 = imagination (picturing in the mind). 感心 = admiration/being impressed. 予感 = a premonition/hunch.

qs.s: 「実感」の意味は？
o: the actual feeling; realizing through experience
qs.e: 実感 is the genuine, felt sense of something real (実感が湧かない = it doesn't feel real yet, 実感がこもる = feels heartfelt/genuine).

m: (front) cover; binding (of a book or magazine)

ex.jp: その雑誌の表紙に有名な俳優が載っていた。
ex.en: A famous actor was on the cover of that magazine.

qs.s: 本の＿＿＿＿のデザインが目を引いて、思わず手に取った。
qs.en: The book's cover design caught my eye, and I picked it up on impulse.
qs.e: 表紙 = the front (or outer) cover of a book/magazine. 目次 = the table of contents. 見出し = a headline/heading. 背表紙 = the spine of a book.

qs.s: 「表紙」の意味は？
o: front cover; binding of a book
qs.e: 表紙 is the outer cover of a book or magazine (表紙を飾る = to grace the cover, 雑誌の表紙 = a magazine cover).

ex.jp: 学生は割引が受けられます。
ex.en: Students can receive a discount.

qs.s: 会員になると、商品が二割＿＿＿＿になる。
qs.en: If you become a member, items are 20% off.
qs.e: 割引 = a discount/price reduction. 値上げ = a price increase (the opposite). 値段 = the price itself. 支払い = payment.

qs.s: 「割引」の意味は？
qs.e: 割引 means reducing the price (割引券 = discount coupon, 早期割引 = early-bird discount). 二割引 = 20% off.

m: opening up; throwing open; making accessible

ex.jp: 校庭は週末、市民に開放されている。
ex.en: The schoolyard is opened to citizens on weekends.

qs.s: 暑いので、窓を全部＿＿＿＿して風を通した。
qs.en: Because it was hot, I threw all the windows open to let air through.
qs.e: 開放 = opening up/throwing open a space to access. 解放 = liberation/freeing from restraint (same reading かいほう). 公開 = releasing/disclosing to the public. 開発 = development (of land, products).

qs.s: 「開放」の意味は？
o: opening up; throwing open; making accessible
qs.e: 開放 = physically opening up or making a space/market accessible (門戸開放 = open-door policy, 市場開放 = market liberalization). Compare 解放 (freeing someone/something from bondage).

m: digit; place (in numbers); order of magnitude

ex.jp: 計算を間違えて、桁が一つ違っていた。
ex.en: I made a calculation error and was off by one digit.

qs.s: 彼の収入は私とは＿＿＿＿が違う。
qs.en: His income is on a completely different order of magnitude from mine.
qs.e: 桁 = a digit/place in a number, hence 'order of magnitude' figuratively. 段 = a step/tier/level. 列 = a row/line/column (of items). 幅 = width/range.

qs.s: 「桁」の意味は？
o: digit; place in a number; order of magnitude
qs.e: 桁 is a numeral place (三桁 = three digits) and figuratively a whole scale of difference (桁違い = on a totally different scale, 桁外れ = extraordinary).

ex.jp: その技術はまだ実用の段階に達していない。
ex.en: That technology hasn't yet reached the stage of practical use.

qs.s: デザインより＿＿＿＿性を重視して、この車を選んだ。
qs.en: I chose this car prioritizing practicality over design.
qs.e: 実用 = practical use/utility (実用性 = practicality). 実験 = an experiment. 実現 = realization (making a plan come true). 実施 = implementation/carrying out (a measure, policy).

qs.s: 「実用」の意味は？
qs.e: 実用 concerns real-world usefulness (実用化 = putting into practical use, 実用的 = practical). 実現 instead means achieving/realizing a goal.

m: personnel affairs; human resources; HR matters

ex.jp: 彼は人事部で採用を担当している。
ex.en: He is in charge of recruitment in the HR department.

qs.s: 春になると、会社では＿＿＿＿異動が行われる。
qs.en: In spring, personnel reassignments take place at the company.
qs.e: 人事 = personnel matters/HR (hiring, transfers, evaluations). 人口 = population. 人物 = a person/character/figure. 人材 = human talent/capable people (a resource).

qs.s: 「人事」の意味は？
qs.e: 人事 covers personnel administration — hiring, transfers, promotions (人事部 = HR department, 人事異動 = personnel reshuffle). Note 人材 means the talented people themselves.

ex.jp: 泥棒が窓から侵入した形跡があった。
ex.en: There were signs that a thief had broken in through the window.

qs.s: 不審者の＿＿＿＿を防ぐため、防犯カメラを設置した。
qs.en: To prevent intrusion by suspicious persons, security cameras were installed.
qs.e: 侵入 = intruding/breaking in illegally or by force (violating a boundary). 進入 = entering/advancing into (neutral, e.g. a plane on approach). 突入 = charging/storming in. 潜入 = sneaking in/infiltrating covertly.

qs.s: 「侵入」の意味は？
qs.e: 侵入 implies an unauthorized or forced entry (不法侵入 = illegal trespass, ウイルスの侵入 = a virus getting in). Note the homophone 進入 (neutral entry, e.g. 進入禁止 = no entry).

ex.jp: 山の中では電波が届きにくい。
ex.en: Reception is poor deep in the mountains.

qs.s: 地下では＿＿＿＿が弱く、電話がつながらない。
qs.en: Underground the signal is weak, and calls won't connect.
qs.e: 電波 = radio waves / wireless signal reception. 電流 = electric current. 電力 = electric power (energy). 電源 = a power source/the power switch.

qs.s: 「電波」の意味は？
o: a power source; the power switch
qs.e: 電波 refers to radio/electromagnetic waves and colloquially to signal strength (電波が悪い = bad reception, 電波が入らない = no signal).

m: somehow; for some reason; without knowing why

ex.jp: なんとなく今日はいいことが起こりそうな気がする。
ex.en: Somehow I have a feeling something good will happen today.

qs.s: 理由はうまく言えないが、＿＿＿＿彼のことが気になる。
qs.en: I can't quite say why, but somehow I'm drawn to him.
qs.e: なんとなく = somehow/for no clear reason (a vague feeling). わざと = on purpose/deliberately. たしかに = certainly/indeed. せっかく = with effort/going to the trouble (and so it'd be a shame to waste).

qs.s: 「なんとなく」の意味は？
o: somehow; for some reason; without knowing why
qs.e: なんとなく expresses a vague feeling with no clear reason (なんとなく分かる = I sort of get it, なんとなく不安 = vaguely uneasy).

ex.jp: 故障した部品を新しいものに交換した。
ex.en: I replaced the broken part with a new one.

qs.s: この機械の＿＿＿＿はすべて国内で生産されている。
qs.en: All the components of this machine are produced domestically.
qs.e: 部品 = a component part that goes into a larger machine. 材料 = raw material/ingredients. 製品 = a finished product. 道具 = a tool/implement.

qs.s: 「部品」の意味は？
qs.e: 部品 are the individual parts assembled into a machine (自動車部品 = car parts, 交換部品 = replacement parts). Contrast 材料 (raw materials) and 製品 (the finished item).

ex.jp: 会議の内容を録音しておいた。
ex.en: I recorded the contents of the meeting.

qs.s: インタビューを＿＿＿＿し、後で文字に起こした。
qs.en: I recorded the interview and later transcribed it.
qs.e: 録音 = recording audio/sound. 録画 = recording video. 放送 = broadcasting. 再生 = playback/playing (also regeneration).

qs.s: 「録音」の意味は？
qs.e: 録音 is specifically recording sound (録音機 = voice recorder, 録音スタジオ = recording studio). For video it's 録画.

ex.jp: この製品には専用のケースが付属している。
ex.en: A dedicated case comes attached with this product.

qs.s: その高校は有名な大学の＿＿＿＿校である。
qs.en: That high school is an affiliated school of a famous university.
qs.e: 付属 = attached to / accompanying / affiliated (a part included with or under a main body). 所属 = belonging to (being a member of an organization). 従属 = subordination/dependence. 付近 = vicinity/nearby.

qs.s: 「付属」の意味は？
qs.e: 付属 means coming attached to or affiliated with a main entity (付属品 = accessories included, 大学付属病院 = a university-affiliated hospital).

ex.jp: この電車は東京方面行きです。
ex.en: This train is bound for the Tokyo area.

qs.s: 彼は音楽＿＿＿＿で活躍している。
qs.en: He is active in the field of music.
qs.e: 方面 = a direction (toward an area), or a field/sphere. 方向 = direction (which way, abstract or concrete). 分野 = a field/domain of study or work. 場面 = a scene/situation.

qs.s: 「方面」の意味は？
o: direction; area; field; sphere of activity
a field/domain of study or work
qs.e: 方面 means a direction toward an area (新宿方面 = toward Shinjuku) or a domain of activity (各方面 = various fields/circles, その方面の専門家 = an expert in that area).

ex.jp: 子どもには無限の可能性がある。
ex.en: Children have infinite potential.

qs.s: 宇宙は＿＿＿＿に広がっていると言われる。
qs.en: The universe is said to extend infinitely.
qs.e: 無限 = infinite/limitless (no bound). 有限 = finite/limited (the opposite). 永遠 = eternal/forever (limitless in time specifically). 膨大 = enormous/vast (huge but finite).

qs.s: 「無限」の意味は？
qs.e: 無限 means without limit (無限大 = infinity, 無限の可能性 = infinite possibilities). Opposite of 有限 (finite).

ex.jp: 明日は就職の面接がある。
ex.en: I have a job interview tomorrow.

qs.s: 書類選考を通過し、来週＿＿＿＿を受けることになった。
qs.en: I passed the document screening and will have an interview next week.
qs.e: 面接 = a formal interview for employment/admission (evaluative). 面会 = visiting/meeting someone (e.g. a patient, a prisoner). 対面 = meeting face-to-face (in person). 面談 = an interview/consultation (e.g. teacher-parent talk; more discussion-oriented).

qs.s: 「面接」の意味は？
qs.e: 面接 specifically means an evaluative interview (面接試験 = interview exam, 一次面接 = first-round interview). 面談 is a less evaluative one-on-one talk.

m: expansion; extension; enlargement (of scale or scope)

ex.jp: 事業の拡張に伴い、社員を増やした。
ex.en: Along with the business expansion, we increased the staff.

qs.s: 道路の＿＿＿＿工事で、車線が増えた。
qs.en: With the road-widening work, the number of lanes increased.
qs.e: 拡張 = expanding/extending size or scope (often physical or systemic). 拡大 = enlargement/magnification (making bigger; can be an image). 増加 = increase in number/quantity. 発展 = development/advancement.

qs.s: 「拡張」の意味は？
o: expansion; extension; enlargement of scale or scope
qs.e: 拡張 means extending or widening capacity/scope (道路拡張 = road widening, 機能拡張 = feature expansion, 拡張子 = file extension). 拡大 emphasizes making something visually/proportionally bigger.

ex.jp: 天文台で星の動きを観測している。
ex.en: They observe the movement of stars at the observatory.

qs.s: 今年は記録的な大雨が＿＿＿＿された。
qs.en: Record-breaking heavy rain was observed/recorded this year.
qs.e: 観測 = scientific observation/measurement (of natural phenomena, with instruments). 観察 = observation by watching closely (behavior, nature). 観光 = sightseeing/tourism. 見物 = watching/seeing as a spectacle.

qs.s: 「観測」の意味は？
qs.e: 観測 implies measuring/monitoring natural phenomena, often with instruments (気象観測 = weather observation, 観測史上初 = first since records began). 観察 is watching attentively without instruments.

ex.jp: 地方自治の重要性が高まっている。
ex.en: The importance of local self-government is increasing.

qs.s: 各地域は一定の＿＿＿＿権を持って運営されている。
qs.en: Each region is run with a certain degree of autonomy.
qs.e: 自治 = self-government/autonomy (governing one's own affairs). 自由 = freedom/liberty. 自立 = independence/self-reliance (standing on one's own). 独裁 = dictatorship.

qs.s: 「自治」の意味は？
qs.e: 自治 is governing one's own community or affairs (地方自治体 = local government/municipality, 自治会 = neighborhood association).

ex.jp: 彼は純粋な気持ちで人を助ける。
ex.en: He helps people out of genuine feelings.

qs.s: これは混ぜ物のない＿＿＿＿なはちみつです。
qs.en: This is pure honey with no additives.
qs.e: 純粋 = pure/unmixed/genuine (no impurities or ulterior motives). 完全 = complete/perfect. 正直 = honest/truthful. 新鮮 = fresh.

qs.s: 「純粋」の意味は？
qs.e: 純粋 means free of any mixture or ulterior motive (純粋な水 = pure water, 純粋な愛 = pure love). Figuratively, innocent and sincere.

m: less than; under (a threshold, not inclusive)

ex.jp: 十八歳未満は入場できません。
ex.en: Those under eighteen may not enter.

qs.s: 千円＿＿＿＿の買い物には、ポイントが付かない。
qs.en: Purchases under 1,000 yen don't earn points.
qs.e: 未満 = strictly less than (the number itself NOT included). 以上 = that amount or more (inclusive). 以下 = that amount or less (inclusive). 前後 = around/approximately.

qs.s: 「未満」の意味は？
qs.e: 未満 excludes the stated number — 18歳未満 means under 18 (17 and below). Contrast 以下, which includes the number (18歳以下 = 18 and under).

ex.jp: 彼は古い車を自分で改造した。
ex.en: He modified the old car himself.

qs.s: 首相は内閣の＿＿＿＿を行い、新しい大臣を任命した。
qs.en: The prime minister carried out a cabinet reshuffle and appointed new ministers.
qs.e: 改造 = remodeling/modifying an existing thing's structure (cars, buildings, cabinets). 改築 = rebuilding/renovating a structure (architecture). 改革 = reform (of systems/society). 改良 = improving/refining (making better).

qs.s: 「改造」の意味は？
qs.e: 改造 means altering the structure of something existing (改造車 = a modified car, 内閣改造 = cabinet reshuffle). 改良 stresses making it better; 改造 just means restructuring.

ex.jp: 駅前の書店で雑誌を買った。
ex.en: I bought a magazine at the bookstore in front of the station.

qs.s: その本は人気で、多くの＿＿＿＿で売り切れている。
qs.en: That book is popular and sold out at many bookstores.
qs.e: 書店 = a bookstore (where books are sold). 本棚 = a bookshelf. 図書館 = a library (where books are borrowed). 出版社 = a publishing company.

qs.s: 「書店」の意味は？
qs.e: 書店 is a shop that sells books (本屋 is the more casual word). Don't confuse with 図書館 (library, for borrowing).

ex.jp: その政党は選挙で多くの議席を得た。
ex.en: That political party won many seats in the election.

qs.s: 複数の＿＿＿＿が連立して政権を作った。
qs.en: Several political parties formed a coalition government.
qs.e: 政党 = a political party (an organized group seeking power). 政府 = the government (the governing body). 政治 = politics/government as a field. 政策 = a policy.

qs.s: 「政党」の意味は？
qs.e: 政党 refers to an organized political party (与党 = ruling party, 野党 = opposition party). Distinct from 政府 (the government itself).

ex.jp: この薬の主な成分は何ですか。
ex.en: What is the main ingredient of this medicine?

qs.s: 化粧品の＿＿＿＿表示をよく確認してから買う。
qs.en: I check the ingredient labeling on cosmetics carefully before buying.
qs.e: 成分 = a constituent component (what something is chemically made of). 材料 = materials/ingredients (used in making/cooking). 原料 = raw material (before processing). 栄養 = nutrition/nutrients.

qs.s: 「成分」の意味は？
qs.e: 成分 refers to the constituent elements that make up a substance (成分分析 = component analysis, 有効成分 = active ingredient). More chemical/analytical than 材料.

ex.jp: 毎朝、ラジオ体操をしている。
ex.en: I do radio calisthenics every morning.

qs.s: 運動の前に、けが防止のため準備＿＿＿＿をする。
qs.en: Before exercising, we do warm-up calisthenics to prevent injury.
qs.e: 体操 = gymnastics/calisthenics (systematic physical exercises). 体育 = physical education (the school subject). 運動 = exercise/physical activity (broad). 競技 = (athletic) competition/event.

qs.s: 「体操」の意味は？
qs.e: 体操 refers to systematic physical exercises or the sport of gymnastics (準備体操 = warm-up exercises, 器械体操 = apparatus gymnastics).

ex.jp: 毎日、電車で一時間かけて通勤している。
ex.en: I commute to work by train, taking an hour every day.

qs.s: 在宅勤務になり、＿＿＿＿の必要がなくなった。
qs.en: With remote work, the need to commute disappeared.
qs.e: 通勤 = commuting to one's job. 通学 = commuting to school. 出勤 = going to/showing up for work (on a given day). 勤務 = working/being on duty (the work itself).

qs.s: 「通勤」の意味は？
qs.e: 通勤 is the trip to and from work (通勤時間 = commute time, 通勤ラッシュ = rush hour). For school it's 通学.

ex.jp: リモコンの電池が切れた。
ex.en: The remote control's batteries ran out.

qs.s: この時計は＿＿＿＿で動くので、コンセントは要らない。
qs.en: This clock runs on batteries, so it doesn't need an outlet.
qs.e: 電池 = a battery/cell (stores power). 電気 = electricity (also 'the lights'). 電源 = a power source/the power switch. 充電 = charging (a battery).

qs.s: 「電池」の意味は？
o: a power source; the power switch
qs.e: 電池 is a battery (乾電池 = dry-cell battery, 充電池 = rechargeable battery, 電池切れ = dead battery).

m: at last; finally; more and more; (the moment is) imminent

ex.jp: いよいよ明日が本番だ。
ex.en: At last, tomorrow is the real thing.

qs.s: 長い準備期間を経て、＿＿＿＿大会が始まる。
qs.en: After a long preparation period, the tournament is finally about to begin.
qs.e: いよいよ = at last/finally, or 'increasingly' (a long-awaited moment arriving). とっくに = long ago/already. なかなか = quite; (with neg.) not easily. せっかく = going to the trouble (and so it'd be a shame to waste).

qs.s: 「いよいよ」の意味は？
o: at last; finally; (the moment is) imminent; more and more
going to the trouble; (a shame to waste)
qs.e: いよいよ signals a long-awaited moment is finally here (いよいよ本番 = the big moment at last) or intensification (雨がいよいよ激しくなる = the rain grows ever heavier).

ex.jp: 何か楽器を演奏できますか。
ex.en: Can you play any musical instrument?

qs.s: ピアノは子どもに人気のある＿＿＿＿の一つだ。
qs.en: The piano is one of the popular musical instruments among children.
qs.e: 楽器 = a musical instrument. 音楽 = music (the art). 演奏 = a (musical) performance/playing. 歌詞 = song lyrics.

qs.s: 「楽器」の意味は？
qs.e: 楽器 means a musical instrument (弦楽器 = string instrument, 打楽器 = percussion, 楽器店 = music store).

m: training; in-service training (for work or skills)

ex.jp: 新入社員は一か月の研修を受ける。
ex.en: New employees undergo a month of training.

qs.s: 海外の支社で三か月の＿＿＿＿を受けることになった。
qs.en: I'm to receive three months of training at the overseas branch.
qs.e: 研修 = job/skills training (structured, often for employees). 研究 = research/study (investigating a topic). 練習 = practice (repetitive drilling). 実習 = practical/hands-on training (an internship, lab practicum).

qs.s: 「研修」の意味は？
o: training; in-service training for work or skills
qs.e: 研修 is organized training to build job skills (新人研修 = new-employee training, 研修会 = a training session). 実習 emphasizes hands-on practice; 練習 is repetition to master a skill.
